Customer : {{ doc.party_name or "" }}    {{ doc.customer_name or "" }} Date : {{ doc.get_formatted("transaction_date") }}
Address : {% if doc.customer_address %}{{ frappe.db.get_value("Address", doc.customer_address, "address_line1") or "" }}{% endif %} Revision Date : {% if doc.valid_till %}{{ doc.get_formatted("valid_till") }}{% endif %}
Phone : {% if doc.contact_person %}{{ frappe.db.get_value("Contact", doc.contact_person, "mobile_no") or "" }}{% endif %} Contact Name : {{ doc.contact_display or "" }}
Delivery Terms : {{ doc.tc_name or "" }} Customer Ref. : {{ doc.get("custom_customer_po_no") or "" }}
Payment Terms : {{ doc.payment_terms_template or "" }}
